sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110533" key="fe/nnos" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φέννος·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θάνατος, ἐνιαυτός</foreign> (i.e. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ϝένος</foreign>), Id. *<orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φένω</orth>, <sense id="n110533.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">θείνω</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
